ideas.title: WebGL globe/timeline of every autonomous pipeline run
ideas.why: Grounded opportunity + world signal: self-built interactive globes of one's own data are the most-upvoted Show HN showcases right now (airline-pilot flights globe), and we have a rich run history plus an existing Yew brain renderer to reuse.

ideas.title: ⌘K command palette for search + content discovery
ideas.why: Destination lens (borrowing from Linear/Vercel): effortless navigation is the #1 thing that makes a site feel like a product — a fuzzy palette over posts/concepts/tags (NOT a shell) turns 98 ontology concepts and the essay archive into something browsable.

ideas.title: Generative matrix-art hero synthesized from the day's top AI news
ideas.why: World signal (AI imagining/generating media draws huge attention): a daily-regenerated WebGL/GLSL hero that visually 'reimagines' the curated headline gives returning visitors a memorable, shareable reason to come back.

ideas.title: Ask-the-blog: RAG Q&A grounded only in the site's own essays
ideas.why: World signal (AI IP/legal + anti-hallucination doctrine): a retrieval-grounded 'ask my writing' that cites the exact post and refuses when unsupported showcases the truthfulness gates as a user-facing feature, running inference on the idle on-prem GB10 nodes.

ideas.title: Per-post reading time + permalink/copy-link affordance
ideas.why: Destination lens (borrowing from Stripe's and Josh Comeau's blogs): solid reading UX — reading time and a one-click permalink — is table stakes for a blog people bookmark and share, and it's currently missing.

ideas.title: Router cost & tier-split telemetry on the ~/factory tab
ideas.why: Signal: router shows cloud_hard=501 vs spark=62 with spark_today=7 while both GB10 nodes sit at 0% util — expensive cloud calls dominate and nobody can see the spend.
